Title: Cross-Browser: Configuration Widget on Firefox
Preconditions: Firefox browser available. Bike with options PDP URL accessible.
Steps: [NAV] Open Bike with options PDP in Firefox browser; [WAIT] Wait for Configure text to appear; [ASSERT] Observe widget renders with correct layout; [ASSERT] Observe radio buttons display correctly; [ACT] Click radio options; verify price updates correctly; [ACT] Set quantity to 1; [ACT] Click Add to cart; [ASSERT] Verify cart add succeeds; [ASSERT] Check browser console for Firefox-specific errors
Assertions: [DOM] Widget renders with correct layout in Firefox; [DOM] Radio buttons display correctly (no broken styling); [MATH] Price updates correctly on option selection; [STATE] Add to cart succeeds; [DOM] Cart shows configured product with correct details; [CONSOLE] No Firefox-specific JavaScript errors
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] Check Firefox console for CSS/JS compatibility errors; [NETWORK] All API calls succeed in Firefox
Failure_Signals: Widget not rendering in Firefox; radio buttons visually broken; price not updating; add-to-cart failing with browser-specific JS error

Title: GraphQL productConfiguration Query Returns Product Section Type with Options
Section: Configurable Products > GraphQL xAPI > Product Section
Preconditions: User authenticated with Bearer token. Configurable Hat product exists at {{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/@td(CFG_HAT.slug) with Product-type configuration sections.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{USER_EMAIL}}/{{USER_PASSWORD}}; [GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with query { productConfiguration(configurableProductId: "configurable-hat-product-id" storeId: {{STORE_ID}}) { configurationSections { id name description type isRequired options { id quantity listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } extendedPrice { amount } product { id name code } } } } }; [VAR] Extract configurationSections array from response
Assertions: [ERRORS] errors[] is empty in response; [DATA] configurationSections[] contains at least one section with type=Product; [DATA] Product section options[] each contain id; quantity; salePrice.amount; extendedPrice.amount; [DATA] options[].product contains id; name; code (non-null); [NULL] response.data.productConfiguration is not null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] Query result matches admin configuration setup; [CONSOLE] No errors if queried via browser GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty despite HTTP 200; type field missing or null; options[] empty; product.name null for Product section options

Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] File section type matches admin setup; [ADMIN] File section visible in admin Configuration tab
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; type=File not found; isRequired value incorrect; response null

Title: updateConfigurationItem Mutation Changes Product Section Selection
Section: Configurable Products > GraphQL xAPI > Update Product Section
Preconditions: User authenticated. Cart contains configurable product with Product section (option A selected). Second option ID known.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token; [SETUP] Add configurable product with Product section option A to cart; [VAR] Note lineItemId; [GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with mutation updateConfigurationItem changing Product section to option B; [VAR] Extract updated configurationItems
Assertions: [ERRORS] updateConfigurationItem errors[] is empty; [DATA] configurationItems[].optionId matches option B (not option A); [MATH] Cart item price updated to reflect option B extendedPrice; [COUNT] Cart item count unchanged (no duplicate)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] Cart query confirms option B in configurationItems; [STOREFRONT] Cart page reflects updated option; [CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; option A still shown after update; duplicate line item created; price unchanged

Title: GraphQL Error Handling for Invalid configurationId and Missing Required Sections
Section: Configurable Products > GraphQL xAPI > Error Handling
Preconditions: User authenticated. Valid configurable product ID and section IDs known.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token; [GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with addItem using non-existent configurableProductId (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000); [VAR] Capture errors[] from response; [GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with addItem for valid configurable product but omit required section from configurationSections; [VAR] Capture errors[] from second response
Assertions: [ERRORS] Non-existent configurationId: errors[] is non-empty with descriptive error code; [ERRORS] Missing required section: errors[] is non-empty indicating required section not provided; [DATA] No cart item created for either invalid request; [NULL] No null pointer exceptions in response
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] Cart query confirms no items added from invalid requests; [CONSOLE] No unhandled 500 errors — controlled 4xx/validation errors expected
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500 instead of controlled error; errors[] empty for invalid input; cart item silently created with invalid config; null pointer in response

Title: Coupon Code Applied to Cart with Configured Product
Section: Configurable Products > Promotions > Coupon on Configured Product
Preconditions: User logged in. Configurable Hat product available (base $15). A valid coupon code exists in the system. Cart is empty.
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/@td(CFG_HAT.slug); [WAIT] Configure widget visible; [ACT] Select a Product section option (note the total price including configuration); [ACT] Click Add to cart; [WAIT] Success notification; [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; [ASSERT] Line item with configured product and total price visible; [ACT] Enter coupon code in promo code field; [ACT] Click Apply; [WAIT] Coupon applied notification or discount line visible
Assertions: [DOM] Coupon code accepted and discount amount displayed; [MATH] Discount applied to configured product total (base + option surcharge); not just base price alone; [MATH] Cart total = configured total - discount amount; [FORMAT] Discount and total display with 2 decimal places; [STATE] Coupon badge or label visible on cart
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] applyCoupon mutation errors[] is empty; [API] Cart response shows coupon discount in discounts[] or promotions[]; [CONSOLE] No JS errors; [NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on coupon apply
Failure_Signals: Coupon rejected for configured product; discount calculated on base price only ignoring surcharge; cart total incorrect; 500 error on apply
Cleanup: Remove coupon and cart item after test

Title: Add Second Configuration Section — Verify Two Independent Accordions on Storefront

Title: Publish/Activate Configurable Product — Verify Visibility on Storefront

Steps: --- ADMIN --- [NAV] Sign in at {{BACK_URL}}; [BLADE] Navigate to Catalog module; [GRID] Locate an unpublished configurable product (IsPublished=false or status=Draft); [BLADE] Open the product detail blade; [ASSERT] Verify product is currently not published; [ACT] Toggle Published status to true or click Publish/Activate; [SAVE] Click Save; [WAIT] Success notification; [ASSERT] Product status shows Published in admin; --- STOREFRONT --- [WAIT] Wait up to 60s for search index update; [NAV] Navigate to the product URL on storefront; [WAIT] Page loads; [ASSERT] Product PDP renders; [ASSERT] Configure the parameters widget visible
Assertions: --- ADMIN --- [TOAST] Success notification after Save; [FORM] Product status shows Published or Active; --- STOREFRONT --- [DOM] Product PDP renders without 404 or redirect; [DOM] Configure the parameters widget visible on published product PDP; [STATE] Product accessible to storefront visitors after publish
Cross_Layer_Checks: [STOREFRONT] Product accessible on storefront within 60s of publish action in admin (search reindex lag); [CONSOLE] No JS errors on storefront PDP; [NETWORK] Product GraphQL query returns product data after publish; [API] Product isPublished=true in xAPI response
Failure_Signals: Product returning 404 on storefront after publish and 60s wait; Configure widget absent after publish; storefront showing unpublished product before publish action; admin Save failing on publish toggle; search index not updating after 60s
Cleanup: Unpublish the product again after test to restore original state

Assertions: --- NO VALID NAME --- [FORM] Validation error shown on section name field when saved empty (e.g., required field indicator or error message); [STATE] Section NOT saved when name is empty; [BLADE] Blade remains open showing validation error; --- VALID NAME --- [TOAST] Success notification shown after valid name entered and saved; [BLADE] New section with name Accessories appears in sections list; [FORM] No validation error present after valid save

Title: Validation — Duplicate Configuration Section Name Behavior

Title: changeCartConfiguredItem with Invalid sectionId Returns errors[] Non-Empty

Preconditions: User authenticated. A configured product is in the cart. lineItemId and a valid configurationSections structure known from previous addItem.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{USER_EMAIL}}/{{USER_PASSWORD}}; [SETUP] Ensure a configured product is in cart — record lineItemId; [GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with mutation changeCartConfiguredItem(command: { storeId: {{STORE_ID}} userId: <user-id> lineItemId: <lineItemId> configurationSections: [{ sectionId: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" value: { productId: "any-id" quantity: 1 } }] quantity: 1 }) { items { configurationItems { sectionId } } errors { code description } }; [VAR] Capture errors[] array from response
Assertions: [ERRORS] errors[] is NON-EMPTY — mutation rejected invalid sectionId; [DATA] errors[].code is present and non-null; [STATE] Cart items remain unchanged (original configurationItems preserved); [DATA] HTTP status is 200 (xAPI convention) but errors[] non-empty signals rejection
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] Follow-up cart query confirms original configurationItems unchanged; [CONSOLE] No unhandled JS errors if tested via storefront; [NETWORK] HTTP 200 with non-empty errors[]
Failure_Signals: errors[] is empty despite invalid sectionId — silent acceptance of bad data; cart configurationItems changed to reflect invalid section; HTTP 4xx/5xx instead of 200+errors[]
Cleanup: No cleanup needed — mutation rejected cart unchanged

Assertions: [STATUS] Import completes without error; [BODY] Imported configuration isActive = true — NOT silently reset to false during import; [BODY] sections[].type = Product with empty options[] preserved; [STATE] The import path (ImportProductConfigurationsAsync) preserves IsActive for configurations with Product sections that have no predefined options

Preconditions: User authenticated with valid payment method. Bike with options PDP accessible. Cart empty. GA4 dataLayer accessible.
Test_Data: user={{USER_EMAIL}}; password={{USER_PASSWORD}}; front_url={{FRONT_URL}}; seat_total=365.00; card={{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}; exp={{TEST_CARD_EXP}}; cvv={{TEST_CARD_CVV}}
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to Bike with options PDP; [WAIT] Configure widget; [ACT] Select Seat option (total $365.00); [ACT] Click Add to cart; [WAIT] Success notification; [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; [ACT] Proceed to checkout — complete shipping address and payment with {{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}/{{TEST_CARD_EXP}}/{{TEST_CARD_CVV}}; [ACT] Click 'Place Order'; [WAIT] Order confirmation page loads; [KEY] Execute in browser console: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase'); [VAR] Capture purchase event from dataLayer
Assertions: [STATE] dataLayer contains purchase event after order confirmation page loads; [DATA] purchase.ecommerce.value = 365.00 (configured total including option — NOT just base $350); [DATA] purchase.ecommerce.transaction_id matches order number on confirmation page; [DATA] purchase.ecommerce.items[0].price = 365.00; [DATA] purchase.ecommerce.items[0].quantity = 1; [DATA] purchase event fires exactly once (not on confirmation page refresh)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] GA4 collection endpoint receives purchase payload; [CONSOLE] No GA4 JS errors; [ADMIN] Order exists in admin with matching total; [API] Order total = 365.00 + shipping + tax
Failure_Signals: purchase event missing; value = 350.00 (base only — option surcharge lost in analytics); transaction_id null or mismatched; purchase fires twice on confirmation page refresh
Cleanup: Order placed — cancel via admin if needed for re-run

Title: Configurable Product Price Excludes Unselected-for-Checkout Config Items
Section: Configurable Products > GraphQL xAPI > SelectedForCheckout Pricing
Preconditions: User authenticated with Bearer token. Configurable product with 2+ optional Product-type sections exists (e.g., Bike with options). Cart is empty. Store supports selectedForCheckout toggling on cart items.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{USER_EMAIL}}/{{USER_PASSWORD}}; [GQL] Add configurable product to cart with 2 optional sections selected via addItem mutation (e.g., Seat at $15 + Pedals at $25 on base $200 product → total $240); [ASSERT] getCart returns line item with configurationItems[] containing both sections; [ASSERT] Line item listPrice/salePrice = $240.00 (base + both options); [GQL] Use changeCartConfiguredItem or equivalent mutation to mark one config item as selectedForCheckout=false (e.g., deselect Pedals section); [GQL] Query cart again: { cart(storeId: {{STORE_ID}}) { items { id listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } configurationItems { sectionId selectedForCheckout salePrice { amount } } } } }; [ASSERT] Verify line item price and configurationItems state
Assertions: [MATH] After deselecting one config item: line item price = base $200 + remaining selected option $15 = $215 (Pedals $25 excluded from total); [DATA] configurationItems[] still contains both sections but selectedForCheckout differs; [DATA] Deselected config item has selectedForCheckout=false; [DATA] Selected config item has selectedForCheckout=true; [MATH] Line item salePrice.amount excludes the deselected config item price; [STATE] Cart subtotal reflects only selected config items
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] addItem mutation errors[] is empty; [API] changeCartConfiguredItem mutation errors[] is empty; [API] getCart returns correct per-item selectedForCheckout values on configurationItems; [API] UpdatePrice on backend correctly filters by SelectedForCheckout; [CONSOLE] No errors; [STOREFRONT] Cart page at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart shows price reflecting only selected config items
Failure_Signals: Line item price still includes deselected config item ($240 instead of $215); selectedForCheckout field missing from configurationItems response; all config items showing selectedForCheckout=true regardless of toggle; cart subtotal incorrect
References: Synced: PR #104 vc-module-x-cart (2026-03-26) — UpdatePrice now filters by SelectedForCheckout

Title: Currency Change Preserves SelectedForCheckout State on Config Items
Preconditions: User authenticated. Store supports at least 2 currencies (e.g., USD and EUR). Configurable product with Product-type sections exists. Cart contains configurable product with at least one config item. Prices exist in both currencies.
Steps: [AUTH] Obtain Bearer token; [GQL] Add configurable product with 2 sections selected to cart via addItem mutation; [GQL] Query cart — record initial prices in USD and configurationItems selectedForCheckout states; [ASSERT] All config items have selectedForCheckout=true and prices in USD; [GQL] Execute changeCartCurrency mutation to switch from USD to EUR; [WAIT] Currency change processed; [GQL] Query cart again: { cart(storeId: {{STORE_ID}}) { items { id currency { code } listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } configurationItems { sectionId selectedForCheckout listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } } } } }; [ASSERT] Verify currency, prices, and selectedForCheckout state after switch
Assertions: [DATA] After currency change: items[].currency.code = EUR; [DATA] configurationItems[].selectedForCheckout values preserved (same as before currency change — true stays true); [MATH] Line item price recalculated in EUR using EUR price list (not simple exchange rate); [MATH] configurationItems[].salePrice.amount reflects EUR prices; [MATH] Line item total = base EUR price + sum of selected config items EUR prices; [STATE] No config items lost or duplicated during currency switch
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] addItem mutation errors[] is empty; [API] changeCartCurrency mutation errors[] empty; [API] getCart after currency change returns all configurationItems with correct EUR prices; [CONSOLE] No errors; [STOREFRONT] Cart page shows EUR prices and currency symbol after switch
Failure_Signals: configurationItems[].selectedForCheckout reset to default after currency change; config item prices still in USD after currency switch; config items lost during currency recalculation; line item total incorrect in new currency; changeCartCurrency errors[] non-empty
Cleanup: Switch currency back to USD and remove cart item after test
References: Synced: PR #104 vc-module-x-cart (2026-03-26) — ChangeCartCurrencyCommandHandler now propagates SelectedForCheckout via new overload
